title: Neo Titans Variant
description: This mod plan aims to add dozens of uniquely shaped and distinctive Titan creature variants to the Neo Titan mod, greatly enriching the gaming experience.
body:
[h1=Overview]
This mod aims to greatly enhance the gaming experience by adding dozens of uniquely shaped and distinctive Titan creature variants to the New Titan Creatures mod.
[h1=Compared to the Original Titan Variants]
- All Titan variants feature unique minion variants and exclusive abilities.
- Optimized the animations of bosses.
- Balanced creature stats; variants will be enhanced under certain special circumstances, rather than being purely recolorations with adjusted values like the original Titan variants.
- Redesigned the textures for the variants.
[h1=Precautions]
This mod is still in development, so the number of creatures is relatively small, and some creature stats may still be subject to adjustment. Please look forward to more variants in future updates.
